positioning_statement: Northstar Advisory helps founder-led B2B service firms turn scattered expertise into a clear offer buyers can trust.
audience_summary: Founder-led consulting and professional service teams with strong delivery but unclear public positioning.
customer_problem: Prospects hear smart ideas but cannot quickly understand the offer, the buying path, or why now is the right time to act.

pain_points.title: The offer changes in every conversation
pain_points.description: Sales calls depend on long explanations because the website does not create a shared frame.

pain_points.title: Proof is hard to scan
pain_points.description: Relevant wins exist, but they are buried in proposals, emails, and founder memory.

core_messages: Turn expertise into a buyer-ready offer
Use verified proof instead of inflated claims
offer_summary: A focused positioning and homepage sprint that turns the approved strategy packet into editable website sections.

services.title: Positioning extraction
services.description: Clarify the audience, problem, offer, and proof requirements from the approved packet.

services.title: Homepage structure
services.description: Map the strategy into a practical homepage flow that can be edited in the builder.

services.title: Export-ready draft
services.description: Produce JSON-driven page content that can be reviewed, edited, and exported.

homepage_headlines: Make your expertise easier to understand and easier to buy.
A clearer homepage draft from your approved strategy packet.

three_step_process.title: Clarify
three_step_process.description: Confirm the buyer, problem, offer, and proof boundaries.

three_step_process.title: Shape
three_step_process.description: Turn the packet into a section-by-section homepage draft.

three_step_process.title: Refine
three_step_process.description: Edit the generated JSON in the builder before export.

proof_points.label: Operators review claims before publishing
proof_points.description: The adapter preserves warnings instead of inventing stronger proof.

proof_points: Client quote needed before final proof section is published

testimonials.quote: The homepage finally matched how we explain the work on calls.

faq_items.question: Can this draft be edited after import?
faq_items.answer: Yes. The adapter creates normal Page JSON that the builder editor can change and save.

faq_items.question: Will brand kit suggestions overwrite the company brand?
faq_items.answer: No. Brand suggestions are shown for review and preserved as import notes.

homepage_section_outline: proof: verified quote and proof needs
validation_warnings: Revenue lift metric mentioned in notes was unverified and should not be used as proof.
Customer logos are not approved for publication yet.
